entries.description: returns the length of a widestring. This traverses the whole string to find the binary zero end marker!

proc `$`(w: openArray[Utf16Char]; replacement: int = 0x0000FFFD): string {.
    raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description:
Decodes a length-delimited UTF-16 slice to UTF-8.

Unlike the WideCString overloads, this preserves the provided length and does not search for a terminating NUL.
